Off Calendar Mar-28-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John T. Renton appearing in propria persona 252-1480, moving for an order to set aside entry of default
Fredrik Emilson, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF ANDREW M. ZACKS 956-8100, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court granted DEFENDANT JOHN T. RENDON's MOTION For Order To Set Aside Entry Of Default. The Court ordered answer filed on 2/4/03 to be stricken. Defendant has 10 days from today to refile answer. Plaintiff is to prepare an order. (DAG/301/NL-X) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

Petition For Declaratory Relief In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 20, 2003.
Off Calendar Mar-24-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Fredrik Emilson, Esq. represented Petitioner James HJ. Brynes. The Court receives evidence and grants judgment in favor of the plaintiffs as follows: Attorney Fees: $1,500.00, Costs: $300.00 for a total money judgment of $1,800.00. The Court also declares that plaintiffs are entitled to withdraw Defendant John T. Rendon's tenancy from coverage by the San Francisco Rent Ordinances. Judgment signed.
